case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, A MUNICIPAL VS. ALEXANDER TIZENBERG et al

docket_entries.description: BEFORE HEARING, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS ORDERED OFF CALENDAR BY COURT. (212)

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, A MUNICIPAL CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT TIZENBERG, ALEXANDER DOES 1 TO 20, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR DEC-31-2009 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  OCT-27-2009 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         DEC-16-2009
DECLARATION OF FRANK P. AGNOST, JR. RE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE: POS FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, A MUNICIPAL CORPORATION

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR FEB-10-2010 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE DEC-31-2009 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
